items.name: Custom URL
items.description: Image URL to display as the SyncLyrics background. You can use the assets folder: http://127.0.0.1:2007/assets/<image filename>?name=Vocaloid Miku!

items.name: Cover Image
items.description: Uses the current track cover as the SyncLyrics background.

items.name: Normal Font
items.description: Applies a normal font to the SyncLyrics.

items.name: Fullscreen Miku XD
items.description: Toggles the Miku image in the fullscreen player.

items.name: Perfect Mark
items.description: Toggles the score label on the queue page.

items.name: Download & Visible Icon
items.description: Toggles the downloaded track and private track icons on the queue page.
